hero.secondary: {entreprise} is above all the story of a passionate craftsman dedicated to his trade, rooted in his region, and determined to offer every client the best quality-to-price ratio.

histoire.secondary: Founded in January 2024 by Rémy Fernandez, an electrician with over 10 years of experience, {entreprise} has grown alongside its projects and the trust of its clients. Today, the company is recognized throughout Lot-et-Garonne for the quality of its work. We believe that a good electrical installation is barely visible, but felt every day: comfort, peace of mind, controlled bills. That's what we offer every client.

cartes.title: Safety First
cartes.text: No compromises on compliance and material quality.

cartes.title: Quality Craftsmanship
cartes.text: Attention to detail, from neatly arranged cables to a flawless panel.

cartes.title: Human Connection
cartes.text: A craftsman who listens, advises, and remains reachable after the job is done.

cartes.title: Local Commitment
cartes.text: We support suppliers and artisans in Lot-et-Garonne.
